creator: dfr@nlsystems.com
text:
On Thu, 18 Mar 1999 dgilbert@velocet.ca wrote:

> 	FreeBSD 2.2.8-RELEASE works, FreeBSD-3.1-RELEASE does not.
> 
> >Description:
> 
> 	Under 2.2.8, This machine (compaq Prolinea 1600) properly
> shows two PCI busses (six slots, 4 onboard devices).  Under 3.1, 
> only PCI bus 0 probes.

This is fixed in revision 1.94 (for 4.0) and 1.86.2.1 (for 3.1) of
pcisupport.c.  You can probably just update this file or alternatively,
upgrade your sources to the 3.1-STABLE branch.

--
